backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining game data types (Player, Block, World, Inventory) and backend functions for managing player state, world blocks, and inventory operations with position-based block comparison and item management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (3D environment, player controller, authentication, visual theme) to their corresponding source files and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend TypeScript/TSX files describing their purpose and functionality in the game application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a vibrant OKLCH color system for light and dark themes with warm oranges, yellows, and corals.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Skyblock Game application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state with Internet Identity, conditionally rendering LoginScreen or GameLayout with theme provider and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginScreen: Vibrant login screen with animated floating blocks, game branding, Internet Identity authentication button, and feature highlights using bright gradient backgrounds.
React Three Fiber canvas setup with lighting, sky, island, player controller, and pointer lock controls for the 3D game environment.
frontend/src/components/game/Island.tsx: Instanced mesh renderer for voxel blocks with vibrant color mapping per block type, loading world data from backend or generating default starting island.
frontend/src/components/game/PlayerContr: Implements first-person player movement with WASD controls, jumping, gravity, and ground collision detection using React Three Fiber hooks.
frontend/src/components/layout/CraftingM: Displays a crafting UI with recipe selection showing inputs/outputs for converting blocks (logs to planks, stone to cobblestone, etc.).
frontend/src/components/layout/GameHUD.t: Renders the in-game heads-up display with health, selected block indicator, action buttons for inventory/crafting, controls help, and crosshair.
frontend/src/components/layout/GameLayou: Main game layout component that orchestrates the 3D canvas, HUD, inventory panel, and crafting menu with state management for UI toggles and block selection.
frontend/src/components/layout/Inventory: Displays player inventory in a grid with block icons, quantities, and selection state; fetches inventory data from backend using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication with login/logout functionality and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching world blocks and inventory data from the backend actor using the authenticated principal.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with a vibrant playful color palette (orange, yellow, coral, red) for both light and dark modes, custom scrollbar styling, game-specific component classes, and float animation keyframes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color system, border radius variables, custom shadows, Inter font family, and accordion/float animations using typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting a Blockman Go-style Skyblock voxel game with existing features including 3D floating islands, player controller, resource gathering, crafting system, Internet Identity authentication, and vibrant visual theme.
